initial_idea: order creation UX - query customer, product and more by input. investigate the proper UX
trace_lanes: Code-path: current order form uses dropdowns/radio instead of searchable input fields
Config/env: API endpoints lack search/filter support for customers and products
Measurement: UX inconsistency - some entities use search, others use dropdowns
trace_result: CustomerCombobox exists and works for customer search but OrderForm uses raw UUID inputs. searchProducts API exists but no ProductCombobox exists anywhere. Backend APIs fully support search. Gap is systemic: CustomerCombobox was not wired into OrderForm, and ProductCombobox was never built.
codebase_context: OrderForm at src/domain/orders/components/OrderForm.tsx uses plain <input> for customer_id and product_id (UUID only). CustomerCombobox with full search exists at src/components/customers/CustomerCombobox.tsx but is not used in OrderForm. listCustomers API supports q param. searchProducts API exists. No ProductCombobox exists anywhere in the codebase.
